name: notification-pileup
title: Notification Pileup
description: Mobile notification cards arrive faster and faster, each new alert pushing the existing stack downward into a dense, anxious tower.

variables.label: Notification count
variables.description: Number of notification cards in the final pile.

variables.label: Arrival speed
variables.description: Pacing multiplier for the accelerating notification arrivals.

variables.label: Unread badges
variables.description: Show or hide unread count badges on the notification cards.
